title: Wire MoveToTool to read coordinates from ActionData.Context (Phase 4 adaptive)
description:
Currently MoveToTool requires explicit x/y/z in ActionData.Arguments. The Phase 4 plan is for SearchMemoryTool to write location data to ToolResult.Data (which AgentBackgroundService carries into planContext), and MoveToTool to read from ActionData.Context when Arguments don't contain coords.

Delivered in Sprint 50 Wave D:
- AgentBackgroundService dispatch loop now merges non-internal Context entries into Arguments before tool validation (TSK-0004 partial)
- planContext dictionary carries plan-level state into each action's Context bag

Remaining items (Sprint 51+):
- Fix context merge: current approach copies ALL non-internal context keys into Arguments, but ToolDispatcher.ValidateAgainstSchema rejects undeclared properties. Replace with per-tool allowlist or IContextAwareTool contract.
- Update SearchMemoryTool to emit structured coordinate hints (nearestX, nearestY, nearestZ) from best result
- Update MoveToTool.ExecuteAsync: if Arguments has x/y/z, use those; else check Context['nearestX'], Context['nearestY'], Context['nearestZ']
- Add ContextCarryTests with both happy path (coordinates found) and failure path (unrelated context keys rejected)
- Update HtnTaskLibrary.GatherWoodDecompose: add SearchMemory → MoveTo flow (currently mines directly)
